race.description: Thomas Farms (Heat 6 Of Autumn Series) Hcp (62)
race.comment: Cracking contest to see us out. HOOKED ON WEALTH (2) racked off sharp splits fresh when just missing at headquarters. Left himself with too much to do again second-up when well supported here, with the subsequent form around him outstanding. Peaking now but needs a solid tempo so he can launch late. CITY PRO (1) got off the mark in fine style second-up after catching the eye fresh. Drawn poorly but has his share of ability and is worth following. LITTLEBOURKESTREET (10) is knocking on the door and should be peaking now third-up. There's plenty of winners around her, suggesting she won't need to improve much to get the verdict this time. LISELLE'S LUCK (18) is building nicely and is another that warrants plenty of respect third-up. Is drawn the A1 and will be in this for a long way. GLOBAL TURN (13) is one always worth including, though she lacks early speed so will likely land a sticky spot from the low draw. Watch for her bursting through late.
